name: Peter Lind Hayes
abstract: Peter Lind Hayes (born Joseph Conrad Lind Jr.; June 25, 1915 – April 21, 1998) was an American vaudeville entertainer and film and television actor.

concerts.label: Concert by the Society for the Preservation and Encouragement of Barbershop Quartet Singing in America

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: he got me a five-week contract with Peter Lynn Hayes and Mary Healy at the Sands Hotel... So I stayed with Peter Lynn Hayes at the Sands for the run he had there and then he took me to New York on the Godfrey Hour. So I was with him for two years

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Bushkin
about_quotes.evidence: Peter Lind Hayes and a few other guys who were involved in the Winged Victory show. Because when David Rose left Winged Victory I became musical director... we wound up playing shows on aircraft carriers
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Bushkin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
